scripts.check: node --check ../shared/sculpt-runtime.js && node --check ../shared/sculpt-runtime.test.mjs && node --check app.js && node --check frame-driver.js && node --check lab-controller.js && node --check object-catalog.js && node --check route-state.js && node --check generate-routes.mjs && node --check png-raster.mjs && node --check capture-hook.mjs && node --check validate-routes.mjs && node --check validate-manifest.mjs && node --check validate-artifacts.mjs && node --check test-object-catalog.mjs && node --check test-route-state.mjs && node --check test-frame-driver.mjs && node --check test-lab-controller.mjs && node --check test-pixel-capture.mjs && node --check test-pixel-readback.mjs && node --check test-mutations.mjs && node --check test-seed-domain.mjs && node --check test-artifact-validator.mjs && node --check targets/articulated-desk-lamp/articulated-desk-lamp-factory.js && node --check targets/articulated-desk-lamp/test-contract.mjs && node --check targets/potted-bonsai/potted-bonsai-factory.js && node --check targets/potted-bonsai/test-potted-bonsai.mjs && node --check targets/ceramic-teapot/ceramic-teapot-factory.js && node --check targets/ceramic-teapot/test-ceramic-teapot.mjs
